summary: Frontend-only test of new 'Pull latest from server' button on Hostinger SFTP admin tab. All 4 acceptance criteria verified: super-admin login works, pull-box renders at top under the Site dropdown containing the sftp-pull button, confirm dialog is triggered and accepted, and clicking pull for 'broadfield' (no SFTP configured) surfaces the friendly HTTP 400 error message in sftp-pull-result. Existing Test/Save SFTP buttons remain present and no crashes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SftpTab pull feature verified. pull-box (contains sftp-pull) sits directly under sftp-site dropdown. For 'broadfield' site (no SFTP configured), backend returns 400 with friendly setup message, correctly displayed in [data-testid=sftp-pull-result]. Real successful pull cannot be tested without valid Hostinger credentials.

verification_details.pull_result_text: ✗ Set up and save this site's Hostinger SFTP details first (host, username, password, remote path), then Test the connection.
